## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔍 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 💻 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📱 Environment:
 - OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows]
 - Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
 - Device: [e.g. iPhone 13, MacBook Pro]
